issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as invalid configuration or network failures.
Only one YAML configuration example is provided; additional realistic demonstrations are missing.

scenarios.name: Configure Envoy as API gateway with prefix routing, retries, and circuit breakers
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a valid listener+routes shell but commonly misses the exact retry_policy retry_on string and per-cluster circuit_breakers.thresholds fields the rubric specifies.

scenarios.name: Add active health checks and zone-aware load balancing to a cluster
scenarios.rationale: Baseline adds generic http_health_check fields but often misses the specific threshold fields and the zone-aware routing/outlier detection patterns called out in the skill.
